name: Crabmeat Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan and cook onion and celery until golden.
2. Add crabmeat, mushrooms, pimiento, celery salt, mace, and cayenne pepper; stir in milk and cream. Cook slowly for 15 minutes.
3. Stir in beaten egg yolks gradually into the mixture. Cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Spoon hot mixture into four to six buttered ramekins or shells. Sprinkle with lemon juice and sprinkle with buttered bread crumbs on top.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F (232°C) until crumbs are brown, about a few minutes.
